name: list_uploaded_files
description: Lists files across all data layers (my_data, domain_data, common) by default. Returns filename, full path, section, file type, size, and upload time. Call this before any read_pdf / read_docx / read_excel / python_run_script call to discover available files. By default searches ALL three layers — use the 'section' parameter to drill down into a specific layer if needed.

section.description: Data layer to list. ALWAYS omit this parameter (or pass null) on the first call — files can exist in any layer. Only specify a section if you already know which layer the file is in.

file_type.description: Filter by file type. Default: all.

sort_by.description: Sort order. Default: uploaded_at descending (newest first).

subfolder.description: Optional subfolder path within a section to list (e.g. 'exports'). Default: list all subfolders recursively.
